sys_ui_script.name: x_dxcis_smart_st_0.sw-layout

sys_update_version.name: sys_ui_script_8a5336d41d83761062a3fd68f681cec5
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ui_script"><sys_ui_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><description/><global>false</global><ignore_in_now_experience>false</ignore_in_now_experience><name>x_dxcis_smart_st_0.sw-layout</name><script><![CDATA[(function () {
  /**
   * Measure sidenav width and expose it as a CSS variable
   * This keeps page layout aligned under resize and zoom.
   */
  function updateSidenavWidth() {
    var sidenav = document.querySelector('.sw-portal-layout__sidenav');

    if (!sidenav) {
      // No sidenav present
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty(
        '--sw-sidenav-width',
        '0px'
      );
      return;
    }

    var width = Math.round(sidenav.getBoundingClientRect().width);

    document.documentElement.style.setProperty(
      '--sw-sidenav-width',
      width + 'px'
    );
  }

  // Run once after initial render
  window.addEventListener('load', function () {
    updateSidenavWidth();
  });

  // Recalculate on resize / zoom
  window.addEventListener('resize', updateSidenavWidth);

  // Recalculate if theme changes (optional but safe)
  document.addEventListener('sw.theme.changed', updateSidenavWidth);
})();
]]></script><script_name>sw-layout</script_name><sys_class_name>sys_ui_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>chanakya.gade</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-02-10 03:53:24</sys_created_on><sys_id>8a5336d41d83761062a3fd68f681cec5</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>x_dxcis_smart_st_0.sw-layout</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Smart Studio Workspace" source="x_dxcis_smart_st_0">3c24ed4a783ab290b4196c8fb1ecad43</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Smart Studio Workspace">3c24ed4a783ab290b4196c8fb1ecad43</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ui_script_8a5336d41d83761062a3fd68f681cec5</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>chanakya.gade</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-10 03:53:24</sys_updated_on><ui_type>0</ui_type><use_scoped_format>false</use_scoped_format></sys_ui_script></record_update>
